nasb.text: as it is written, “He who  gathered  much did not have too much, and he who  gathered  little had no lack.”

esv.text: As it is written, “Whoever gathered much had nothing left over, and whoever gathered little had no lack.”

cnv.text: 正如經上所記： “多的，沒有剩餘， 少的，也不缺乏。”

ccb.text: 正如圣经上说：“多拾的没有剩余，少拾的也没有缺乏。”

csbs.text: 正如经上所记： “多收的没有增多， 少收的也没有缺少。”
